title: Workday Payroll Pay Run
description: A pay run represents a single payroll processing cycle for a pay group, encompassing the calculation, review, and completion of payroll for a specific pay period.

id.description: Unique identifier for the pay run

descriptor.description: Human-readable name of the pay run

status.description: Current status of the pay run

runCategory.description: Category of the pay run indicating whether it is a regular, off-cycle, or on-demand run

paymentDate.description: Date payments will be distributed to workers

totalGrossPay.description: Total gross pay for all workers in the pay run

totalNetPay.description: Total net pay after deductions and taxes

totalTaxes.description: Total tax withholdings across all workers

workerCount.description: Number of workers included in the pay run

createdOn.description: Timestamp when the pay run was created

completedOn.description: Timestamp when the pay run was completed

PayGroupRef.description: Reference to a pay group that organizes workers for payroll processing

PayPeriod.description: Date range defining the pay period covered by the run

startDate.description: Start date of the pay period

endDate.description: End date of the pay period
